pr.title: Add Codex CLI provider and project integration
pr.body:
## Summary

- add local Codex CLI LLM provider support through authenticated `codex exec` sessions, including provider registry wiring, `reasoning`-compatible generation calls, and zero-cost subscription usage tracking
- add project-local Codex setup for MCP config, lifecycle hooks, plugin metadata, skills, and managed `AGENTS.md` generation
- install Codex hooks through the import-isolated `repowise-augment` entry point and enable the current Codex `[features] hooks = true` flag
- update CLI commands, docs, examples, and website pages for Codex setup

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `uv run pytest tests/providers/test_registry.py tests/unit/cli/test_commands.py tests/unit/cli/test_helpers.py tests/unit/cli/test_mcp_config.py tests/unit/cli/test_augment_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/test_editor_files.py tests/unit/cli/test_claude_md_prompt.py tests/unit/cli/test_cost_estimator.py tests/unit/generation/test_agents_md.py tests/unit/generation/test_cost_tracker.py tests/unit/test_providers/test_codex_cli_provider.py tests/unit/test_providers/test_cost_estimator.py tests/unit/cli/test_codex_plugin.py`
- `codex exec --ephemeral --sandbox read-only --json --cd . "Return exactly OK."`
- `codex features list | rg '^hooks\s+'`
pr.author: Selene29
